goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'ely' and should leave on 'thursday'.
The train should 'arrive by 11:15' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '8 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'whipple museum of the history of science'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.

info.name: whipple museum of the history of science

fail_info.name: gallery at twelve a high street

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from ely and should leave on thursday
The train should arrive by 11:15 and should go to cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 8 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called whipple museum of the history of science
Make sure you get entrance fee
